page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 64 vCPUs. The instance is configured with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 1:1 ratio of 1.0 GB RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by a 20 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Performance benchmarks indicate a contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as shown by stress-ng and Geekbench single-core tests falling into the bottom 25%, and single-threaded gzip compression rated in the bottom 10%. However, multi-core execution leverages the high core count effectively, achieving average ratings in stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU tests. Multi-threaded bzip3 decompression performs strongly, placing in the top 25%. Memory bandwidth and Redis SET operations maintain average performance tiers.

Given its high core density paired with a minimal memory footprint, this instance offers a specialized cost-efficiency profile. It is suited for parallelizable, compute-heavy workloads that do not require large memory allocations, such as multi-threaded compression, batch processing, and certain CPU-bound simulation tasks. It is less suitable for memory-intensive databases, large-scale caching, or single-threaded applications due to the low RAM-per-core ratio and weak single-core performance.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.16xlarge is an x86_64 compute-focused server featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs operating at 2.5 GHz, paired with 64.0 GB of RAM. This configuration establishes a 1:1 RAM-to-vCPU ratio, making it highly specialized for memory-lean, compute-intensive tasks. The instance lacks local storage and GPUs, relying on a 20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data reveals weak single-core performance but average multi-core capabilities, highlighted by strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression. This server is best suited for highly parallelized, CPU-bound workloads such as batch processing, multi-threaded data compression, and web serving, where resource density can be maximized without requiring large memory footprints.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.16xlarge is an x86_64 server with 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 64 GB RAM, and 20 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for highly parallelized, memory-lean compute workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ic5.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 64 GB RAM, delivering strong multi-threaded performance for compute-heavy tasks.
tagline: A high-density, memory-lean compute instance featuring 64 dedicated cores optimized for highly parallelized, CPU-bound processing workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 vCPUs at 2.5 GHz
64.0 GB of RAM providing a 1:1 RAM-to-vCPU ratio
20 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
Strong multi-threaded performance in compression and decompression benchmarks
Weak single-core and single-threaded processing capabilities
Best suited for parallel batch processing and memory-lean compute workloads
